workflow.name: Scrape LinkedIn B2B leads with Apify and GPT-4 and approve emails in Sheets
workflow.description:
## What this workflow does

Fully production-ready B2B lead outreach pipeline that:

1. Takes industry keywords from a form trigger (or you can manually add rows to Google Sheets)
2. Scrapes targeted LinkedIn leads using Apify (peakydev~leads-scraper-ppe actor)
3. Filters for valid emails
4. Automatically creates company + contact records in **HubSpot CRM**
5. Generates highly personalized, non-salesy cold emails using GPT (tailored to the company’s industry)
6. Logs every lead to Google Sheets with "Pending" status
7. Waits for **human approval or rejection** — triggered **directly from Google Sheets** via two webhooks:
   - **Approve** (via button/script in sheet) → sends the email via Gmail
   - **Reject** (via button/script in sheet) → automatically rewrites a softer, more value-focused version with a different angle → updates the same row in the sheet

## Why this is useful

Most outreach automations send emails blindly.  
This one gives you **full control with a human-in-the-loop layer inside Google Sheets** + **automatic intelligent rewrite on rejection** — which greatly improves reply rates, reduces spam complaints, and protects your sender reputation.

Ideal if you:
- Run outbound campaigns at reasonable scale
- Already live in Google Sheets for lead review
- Want clean HubSpot CRM records before sending anything
- Need traceable approval (who approved what, when)
- Often hear “too salesy” and want the AI to adapt automatically

## How to use

1. Import the workflow into n8n
2. Connect the required credentials:
   - Apify API token
   - HubSpot App Token (Private App)
   - Gmail OAuth2
   - Google Sheets OAuth2
   - OpenAI API key
3. Replace placeholders:
   - Your Google Sheet ID in the “Leads Log” node
   - Your name & signature in the AI prompts
   - Any test email addresses if needed
4. Activate the main **Form Trigger** (`Lead Campaign Setup`) to start campaigns
5. **Review & act from Google Sheets**:
   - Leads appear in your sheet with "Pending" status
   - Use simple buttons or a dropdown + Apps Script (code examples provided in workflow sticky notes) to trigger:
     - Approve → POST to `/webhook/approved`
     - Reject → POST to `/webhook/rejected`
## Required credentials

- Apify
- HubSpot (App Token)
- Gmail OAuth2
- Google Sheets OAuth2
- OpenAI

Once set up, you get a beautiful hybrid system: generate leads automatically → review & decide in familiar Google Sheets → one-click action → n8n handles sending or smart rewriting.

Enjoy — and feel free to share your reply rates or any tweaks you make after running a few campaigns! 🪄

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert Automation Engineer & B2B Outreach Specialist.

You will receive USER INPUT as a JSON array of lead objects.
Each object represents one lead with personal and company details.

Your task:
- Read the USER INPUT carefully
- Generate ONE personalized, professional cold email per lead
- Use the lead’s:
  - fullName
  - position
  - organizationName
  - organizationIndustry
  - organizationDescription
  - organizationWebsite (if helpful)
- The email must feel human, relevant, and non-salesy
- Focus on how automation can save time, reduce manual work, and improve efficiency
- Tailor the value proposition based on the company’s industry (e.g. Travel, SaaS, E-commerce, Agency)

Email requirements:
- Friendly and professional tone
- Short, clear paragraphs
- No hype, no buzzwords
- One clear CTA (call to action)
- Do NOT mention scraping, APIs, or data sources
- Do NOT say “I found you on LinkedIn”
- Do NOT invent facts beyond the provided data

Email structure:
1. Subject line (short & relevant)
2. Personalized greeting using fullName
3. One sentence showing you understand their business
4. How automation can help their specific type of company
5. What you do as an automation engineer (brief)
6. Soft CTA (call, reply, or quick chat)
7. Professional sign-off

Output format (VERY IMPORTANT):
Return ONLY the email content in plain text like this:

Subject: <subject line>

Hi <Full Name>,

<email body>

Best regards,  
<Your Name>  
Automation Engineer

If multiple users are provided, generate a separate email for EACH user.

nodes.name: make separate json of each keyword

parameters.formDescription: This form configures automated LinkedIn lead extraction for targeted B2B marketing campaigns. By providing specific criteria below, our system will scrape high-quality leads from LinkedIn based on your business needs.

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert Automation Engineer and B2B Outreach Copywriter.

You will receive USER INPUT as a JSON string.
The JSON may include:
- previous lead data
- current lead data
- an emailContent field
- a Status field that can be "Rejected"

IMPORTANT CONTEXT:
The existing email was REJECTED.
Your task is to REWRITE and IMPROVE the email with a different angle.
Do NOT repeat the same phrasing, structure, or opening.

Your goals:
- Generate a NEW outreach email that feels more:
  - Helpful
  - Softer
  - More value-focused
  - Less salesy
- Adapt tone to the lead’s industry (Education, SaaS, Agency, etc.)
- Emphasize assistance, clarity, and practical benefits
- Avoid pressure, avoid aggressive CTAs

Rules:
- Use ONLY data present in the USER INPUT
- Do NOT mention rejection or status
- Do NOT mention LinkedIn, scraping, or data sources
- Do NOT invent personal details
- Keep it short, polite, and respectful
- One clear but low-friction CTA

Personalization:
- If name is available, use it
- Reference the organization’s industry and context
- Frame automation as support, not disruption

Email structure:
1. New subject line (different from previous)
2. Polite greeting
3. Acknowledge their work context subtly
4. Practical automation examples relevant to their industry
5. Brief intro of yourself as an automation engineer
6. Soft CTA (reply, short chat, or simple question)
7. Professional sign-off

Output format (STRICT):
Return ONLY the updated email in plain text:

Subject: <new subject>

Hi <Name>,

<email body>

Best regards,  
<Your Name>  
Automation Engineer

If multiple users exist in the input, generate ONE updated email PER user.
Do not include explanations, JSON, or commentary — only the email text.

parameters.content:
## How it works

1. You submit lead keywords (industry, role, location) using the form trigger or by adding rows in Google Sheets.
2. The workflow scrapes targeted LinkedIn leads via Apify and processes them in batches.
3. Leads are filtered to keep only contacts with valid email addresses.
4. Company and contact records are automatically created in HubSpot CRM.
5. AI generates a personalized, non-salesy cold email for each lead, tailored to the company’s industry.
6. All leads and email drafts are logged in Google Sheets with a **Pending** status.
7. You review leads directly inside Google Sheets:

   * **Approve** → the email is sent automatically via Gmail.
   * **Reject** → the email is rewritten with a softer, value-focused angle and updated in the same sheet row.
8. This creates a full human-in-the-loop outreach system with traceable decisions and clean CRM data.

---

## Setup steps

1. Import the workflow into n8n.
2. Connect required credentials:

   * Apify API token
   * HubSpot App Token
   * Google Sheets OAuth2
   * Gmail OAuth2
   * OpenAI API key
3. Update placeholders:

   * Google Sheet ID in the “Leads Log” node
   * Your name and signature inside the AI prompts
4. Activate the **Lead Campaign Setup** form trigger to start collecting leads.
5. Review leads in Google Sheets and use approval or rejection actions to control email sending and rewriting.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
